name: @joescreen/app
description: JoeScreen — SharePlay-based CoScreen clone (Swift macOS + iOS). Built by Xcode; this package.json only exposes the Swift/Xcode build to the turbo task graph.

scripts.build: xcodegen generate --spec Apps/project.yml && xcodebuild -project Apps/JoeScreen.xcodeproj -scheme JoeScreen-macOS -derivedDataPath build build
